claim: Superpowers (obra/superpowers) provides a complete development methodology with skills, agents, hooks, and config files that automatically triggers agents through the Claude Code plugin system.
actionable: Install superpowers via /plugin install superpowers in Claude Code to get automatic skill activation, spec writing, planning (2-5 min), TDD workflows, and code review without manual triggering.
source_title: 6 Claude Code GitHub Repos That Change Everything

claim: Everything Claude Code has 48 specialized agents, 182 skills, 68 commands, and token optimization that cuts bills in half; includes memory persistence, CVE scanning, and prompt injection blocking.
actionable: Install via /plugin install everything-claude-code to get immediate access to a comprehensive agent framework optimized for different LLM clients (Claude, Cursor, etc).
source_title: 6 Claude Code GitHub Repos That Change Everything

claim: Ruflo enables 100+ specialized agents that self-organize into swarms with shared memory across sessions and federated comms for secure team collaboration without data leakage.
actionable: Graduate to Ruflo when you need multi-agent swarms for heavy workloads and want to minimize token usage through shared memory and decentralized coordination.
source_title: 6 Claude Code GitHub Repos That Change Everything

claim: Open Design provides 31 design skills, 72 brand-grade design systems (Linear, Stripe, Airbnb, Tesla, Apple, Notion templates), and auto-detects design direction with 5-dimensional self-critiquing.
actionable: Install Open Design early if building UI/websites/artifacts; it generates design-system-aware code without the heavy token cost of Claude Design.
source_title: 6 Claude Code GitHub Repos That Change Everything

claim: Obsidian Skills bridges your second brain (Obsidian PKM vault) with AI by supporting native markdown features (wiki links, embeds, properties, canvas) and Obsidian CLI integration.
actionable: If using Obsidian for knowledge management, install Obsidian Skills to enable agents to reference and update your vault without breaking links or structure.
source_title: 6 Claude Code GitHub Repos That Change Everything

claim: Karpathy-inspired Claude Code guidelines enforce four principles: think before coding, build the simplest thing, make surgical changes, don't improve what wasn't asked.
actionable: Add the Karpathy skills repo to your Claude MD to inject these principles; this prevents AI from over-engineering and scope-creeping changes.
source_title: 6 Claude Code GitHub Repos That Change Everything

claim: Most Claude Code users stay average because they use it as fancy autocomplete; expert users stack these 6 repos to become a senior engineer with discipline, design skills, and autonomous swarms.
actionable: Stop using Claude Code as a copilot; layer superpowers, everything-claude-code, open-design, and other repos to get actual agentic capabilities.
source_title: 6 Claude Code GitHub Repos That Change Everything

claim: Superpowers is the #1 recommendation because Anthropic included it in their marketplace, making it a first-class plugin with auto-triggering capabilities.
actionable: Start with superpowers as your first repo install; everything else compounds on the methodology it establishes.
source_title: 6 Claude Code GitHub Repos That Change Everything
